dedupe.method: report number (global across all 12 yearly datasets)
dedupe.note: source rows are per-involvement (VIC/SUS/ARR/…); incidents are distinct report numbers (server COUNT DISTINCT == client dedupe, verified per dataset and per month)

sourceGaps.note: final days of December missing from the 2016 yearly snapshot (rows stop 2016-12-25)
last day of 2018 missing from the 2018 yearly snapshot (rows stop 2018-12-30)
final days of December missing from the 2020 yearly snapshot (rows stop 2020-12-27)
final days of December missing from the 2021 yearly snapshot (rows stop 2021-12-26)

KCPD records-system change: involvement-row structure changes (~2.5× → ~1.8× rows/report), ibrs completeness drops (~0.7% → ~9–15% null through 2025), and 2019–2021 rows are ~18–24% missing coordinates — deduped incident counts are the comparable series; the 'other' category and unplaced share rise accordingly and are disclosed, never patched
